stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P03 A1 省级与重点城市 cohort

value.user_value: Batched provincial (A1) backfill via the T049 family: provinces are expanded by cohort batches with a per-batch gate (no big-bang) and failed-province isolation. 9 real A1 province documents backfilled across 3 provinces (Jiangsu, Shandong, Beijing) in 2 gated batches; a genuinely blocked province (Guangdong) was isolated without stopping its batch or the run.
value.why_it_matters: A1 is 31 provincial regions plus key cities; a safe rollout must add them incrementally, gate each batch, and never let one failing province stall the whole expansion. This is the execution vehicle for province coverage.

cost.note: unknown != 0; the backfill ran from the DEV environment (not the worker) -> 0 cloud cost, DIR-007 unaffected.
cost.human_maintenance: dev-env batched province backfill (3 provinces x 3 docs) + orchestrator authoring

deployment: SHADOW (dev-env batched backfill; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
